context: Tests whether the agent implements the skill's slide source hierarchy (pptx > pdf > video_extracted > none), correctly handles video-only talks as processable, sets slide_source and status fields per the skill's rules, and follows the error handling matrix.

checklist.name: PPTX highest priority
checklist.description: When both PPTX and PDF are available, slide_source is set to 'both' or 'pptx' — NOT 'pdf'

checklist.name: Video-only talks are processable
checklist.description: A talk with video_url but NO slides_url and NO pptx_path is NOT skipped — it receives slide_source 'video_extracted' and can reach 'processed' status

checklist.name: No-video talks skipped
checklist.description: A talk with no video_url is marked as skipped (not processable), regardless of whether slides exist

checklist.name: Four-value slide_source
checklist.description: The slide_source field uses at least these distinct values across the test cases: 'pptx' (or 'both'), 'pdf', 'video_extracted', and 'none'

checklist.name: Video extraction produces YouTube-ID-named PDF
checklist.description: For video-extracted talks, the output PDF path or filename references the YouTube video ID (e.g., 'slides/aBcDeFg.pdf' or '{youtube_id}.pdf'), not a generic name

checklist.name: Transcript OK + slides fail + video OK = processed
checklist.description: When slides (PDF/PPTX) fail but video is available, the talk falls back to video extraction and can reach 'processed' status (not 'processed_partial')

checklist.name: Transcript OK + no slides + no video = processed_partial
checklist.description: When only the transcript succeeds (no slides, no video), the status is 'processed_partial' (transcript-only analysis)

checklist.name: All fail = skipped_download_failed
checklist.description: When both transcript and all slide sources fail, the status is set to 'skipped_download_failed' (or similar skip status), not 'processed'

checklist.name: Video deleted after extraction
checklist.description: The processing logic includes cleanup of the downloaded video file after slide extraction is complete — either documented in code comments, log output, or implemented in the processing function

checklist.name: Slide source hierarchy documented
checklist.description: The processing log or code comments describe the priority order of slide sources — making clear that PPTX is preferred over PDF, PDF over video extraction
